description: EVALUATE ALSO: multi-subject matching. WS-A=1 AND WS-B=2 must both match.
notes: EVALUATE WS-A ALSO WS-B generates a compound condition: ws_a.value == 1 AND ws_b.value == 2. Both match, so WS-RESULT='MATCH'. Note: engine does not pad string results inside EVALUATE branches (IBM would pad to PIC X(10) width).
